case_title: NELL HUDSON VS. DIGNITY HEALTH ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-26-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-16-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF HUDSON, NELL
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-04-2020 CONTINUED TO DEC-16-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-26-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
